sectionTitle: How to Have a Healthy Diet?

items.sentencePinyin: Zhǐyào nǐ xǐhuān, jiù kěyǐ chī.
items.sentenceEnglish: As long as you like it, you can eat it.

items.sentencePinyin: Wǒ bù tǎoyàn chī qīngcài.
items.sentenceEnglish: I do not dislike eating vegetables.

items.sentencePinyin: Wǒ jīntiān chī le sān cān.
items.sentenceEnglish: I ate three meals today.

items.sentenceChinese: 每個人都應該尊重不同的宗教。
items.sentencePinyin: Měi ge rén dōu yīnggāi zūnzhòng bùtóng de zōngjiào.
items.sentenceEnglish: Everyone should respect different religions.

items.sentencePinyin: Zhè gēn wǒ de zōngjiào yǒu guānxi.
items.sentenceEnglish: This is related to my religion.

items.sentencePinyin: Zhè jiā diàn de shǔtiáo hěn hǎochī.
items.sentenceEnglish: The French fries at this shop are delicious.

items.sentencePinyin: Zhè dào cài de zuòfǎ hěn jiǎndān.
items.sentenceEnglish: The way to make this dish is very simple.

items.sentencePinyin: Wǒ yuè chī yuè è.
items.sentenceEnglish: The more I eat, the hungrier I get.

items.sentencePinyin: Zhège wèntí hěn jiǎndān.
items.sentenceEnglish: This question is very simple.

items.sentencePinyin: Zhèxiē cài kěyǐ yòng zhēng de.
items.sentenceEnglish: These dishes can be steamed.

items.sentencePinyin: Wǒ xǐhuān mǎi yǒujī shípǐn.
items.sentenceEnglish: I like to buy organic food.

items.sentenceChinese: 這家店賣很多健康食品。
items.sentencePinyin: Zhè jiā diàn mài hěn duō jiànkāng shípǐn.
items.sentenceEnglish: This shop sells a lot of healthy food.

items.sentencePinyin: Wǒmen yào yìqǐ bǎohù dìqiú.
items.sentenceEnglish: We should protect the earth together.

items.sentencePinyin: Kōngqì wūrǎn hěn yánzhòng.
items.sentenceEnglish: Air pollution is very serious.

items.sentencePinyin: Zhège wèntí hěn yánzhòng.
items.sentenceEnglish: This problem is serious.

items.sentencePinyin: Zuòfàn yǐqián yào zhùyì wèishēng.
items.sentenceEnglish: Before cooking, you should pay attention to hygiene.

items.sentencePinyin: Shūcài hěn yǒu yíngyǎng.
items.sentenceEnglish: Vegetables are very nutritious.

items.sentenceChinese: 我喜歡吃水果、青菜什麼的。
items.sentencePinyin: Wǒ xǐhuān chī shuǐguǒ, qīngcài shénmede.
items.sentenceEnglish: I like to eat fruit, vegetables, and things like that.

items.sentencePinyin: Zhè jiā diàn shì xīn kāi de.
items.sentenceEnglish: This shop was newly opened.

items.sentencePinyin: Wǒ péngyǒu xiǎng kāi yì jiā cāntīng.
items.sentenceEnglish: My friend wants to open a restaurant.

items.sentencePinyin: Zhè jiā cāntīng yǒu hěn duō sùshí.
items.sentenceEnglish: This restaurant has a lot of vegetarian food.

items.sentencePinyin: Wǒ hěn shǎo chī sùshí.
items.sentenceEnglish: I rarely eat fast food.

items.sentencePinyin: Nǐ shuō cuò le.
items.sentenceEnglish: You said it wrong.

items.sentenceChinese: 我不吃豬肉，可是我吃牛肉。
items.sentencePinyin: Wǒ bù chī zhūròu, kěshì wǒ chī niúròu.
items.sentenceEnglish: I don't eat pork, but I eat beef.

items.english: an interjection particle, calling for attention
items.sentencePinyin: Èi, nǐ kàn nà jiā xīn cāntīng!
items.sentenceEnglish: Hey, look at that new restaurant!

items.sentencePinyin: Qǐng ràng wǒ shìshi kàn.
items.sentenceEnglish: Please let me try.

items.english: to be a vegetarian, to eat vegetarian food
items.sentenceChinese: 我姐姐因為宗教的關係吃素。
items.sentencePinyin: Wǒ jiějie yīnwèi zōngjiào de guānxi chīsù.
items.sentenceEnglish: My older sister is vegetarian because of religion.

items.sentencePinyin: Tā zuì xǐhuān chī hànbǎo.
items.sentenceEnglish: He likes hamburgers the most.

items.sentencePinyin: Tā zuìjìn biàn shòu le.
items.sentenceEnglish: He has become thinner recently.

items.sentenceChinese: 吃太多油膩的東西很容易變胖。
items.sentencePinyin: Chī tài duō yóunì de dōngxi hěn róngyì biàn pàng.
items.sentenceEnglish: Eating too much greasy food can easily make you gain weight.

items.sentenceChinese: 今天晚上我們點幾樣素菜吧。
items.sentencePinyin: Jīntiān wǎnshàng wǒmen diǎn jǐ yàng sùcài ba.
items.sentenceEnglish: Let's order a few vegetarian dishes tonight.

items.sentencePinyin: Zhè dào cài yǒu yìdiǎn yóunì.
items.sentenceEnglish: This dish is a little oily.

items.sentencePinyin: Zhè jiā diàn yǒu hěn duō yàng cài.
items.sentenceEnglish: This restaurant has many kinds of dishes.

items.sentenceChinese: 我很好奇他為什麼吃素。
items.sentencePinyin: Wǒ hěn hàoqí tā wèishéme chīsù.
items.sentenceEnglish: I am curious why he is vegetarian.

items.sentencePinyin: Nàge nǚhái shì wǒ de tóngxué.
items.sentenceEnglish: That girl is my classmate.

items.sentencePinyin: Duō chī qīngcài duì shēntǐ hěn hǎo.
items.sentenceEnglish: Eating more vegetables is good for your body.

items.sentencePinyin: Tā hěn shòu, dànshì hěn jiànkāng.
items.sentenceEnglish: She is thin, but very healthy.

items.sentencePinyin: Wǒ de shìyǒu bù chī niúròu.
items.sentenceEnglish: My roommate does not eat beef.

items.sentencePinyin: Zhège shuǐjiǎo lǐmiàn yǒu zhūròu.
items.sentenceEnglish: There is pork inside these dumplings.

items.sentenceChinese: 很多西方人喜歡吃沙拉。
items.sentencePinyin: Hěn duō xīfāng rén xǐhuān chī shālā.
items.sentenceEnglish: Many Western people like to eat salad.

items.sentencePinyin: Wǒ wánquán tóngyì nǐ de kànfǎ.
items.sentenceEnglish: I completely agree with your opinion.

items.sentencePinyin: Zhège tāng tài xián le.
items.sentenceEnglish: This soup is too salty.

items.sentencePinyin: Zhèxiē shǔtiáo shì yòng zhá de.
items.sentenceEnglish: These French fries are deep-fried.
